inputs.label: Distillate mole fraction (xD)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in distillate

inputs.label: Bottoms mole fraction (xB)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in bottoms

inputs.label: Feed mole fraction (xF)
inputs.businessContext: Mole fraction of more volatile component in feed

inputs.label: Reflux ratio (R)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of liquid returned to column to distillate removed

inputs.label: Relative volatility (α)
inputs.businessContext: Relative volatility of more volatile component

inputs.label: Feed quality (q)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of feed that is liquid (1 for saturated liquid, 0 for saturated vapor)

breakdown: nMin: Minimum number of theoretical stages
nActual: Actual number of theoretical stages
operatingLineSlope: Slope of operating line (rectifying section)
operatingLineIntercept: Intercept of operating line (rectifying section)
